title: abutilon reventum
intro: Abutilon reventum, also known as the red flowered abutilon or Indian mallow, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. The medicinal properties of Abutilon reventum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Abutilon reventum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
